description: Scan a PHPNomad project and build the boot sequence index

signature: inspect:di {--path=./:Target project path} {--format=table:Output format — table or json} {--fresh:Force re-index instead of reading cached index}
description: Display the boot sequence and dependency injection bindings for a PHPNomad project

signature: inspect:routes {--path=./:Target project path} {--format=table:Output format — table or json} {--fresh:Force re-index instead of reading cached index}
description: List REST routes in a PHPNomad project with their capabilities

signature: context {--path=./:Target project path} {--fresh:Force re-index} {--sections=:Comma-separated sections to include} {--output=stdout:Output destination — stdout or file}
description: Generate a compact project context summary for AI agents
